title: evolvulus lanatus
intro: Evolvulus lanatus, also known as Dwarf Blue Daze, is a flowering plant species in the Convolvulaceae family, native to tropical regions of Central and South America. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which make it effective in treating skin conditions and wounds. The health benefits of Evolvulus lanatus include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and exhibit antioxidant properties. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, allowing for various methods of harnessing its medicinal properties.
